//: Scoping marker for the Playwright flux visual runner. Declaring commonjs here lets Playwright's TS-to-CJS transform succeed without the parent ts/ package.json (type=module) fighting the require() calls the transform emits. node_modules is a symlink to ../../../ts/node_modules so @playwright/test, @axe-core/playwright, and esbuild resolve from this directory.
name: adk-fluent-flux-visual-specs
